site.title: One File Tools
site.description: A collection of useful developer tools, each built as a single, self-contained HTML file. No build step. No dependencies. No frameworks.

categories.name: Accessibility
categories.description: Contrast checkers, heading structure, ARIA references

categories.name: Browser & Network
categories.description: User agents, viewport info, cookies, and headers

categories.name: Color Tools
categories.description: Pickers, contrast checkers, palettes, and converters

categories.name: CSS Tools
categories.description: Shadows, grids, flexbox, gradients, and generators

categories.name: Developer Utilities
categories.description: UUIDs, hashes, regex, cron, passwords, and QR codes

categories.name: Image Tools
categories.description: Dimensions, converters, SVG, favicons, and metadata

categories.name: JSON & API
categories.description: Formatters, JWT decoders, URL encoders, and curl builders

categories.name: Text & Content
categories.description: Counters, converters, diffs, and Markdown preview

categories.name: Web & SEO
categories.description: Meta tags, OG previews, sitemaps, and SEO utilities

tools.name: .env Parser & Validator
tools.shortDescription: Parse, validate, mask, search, and export .env files entirely in the browser.
tools.longDescription:
## .env Parser & Validator

A privacy-first developer utility for inspecting .env configuration files locally without uploads, servers, or dependencies.

### Features

- Paste, upload, or drag and drop .env files
- Parses comments, blank lines, quoted values, escaped characters, empty values, and spaces around equals signs
- Detects duplicate keys, malformed lines, invalid names, whitespace issues, empty values, invalid quotes, unused comments, and suspicious values
- Masks sensitive variables such as API keys, secrets, passwords, tokens, private keys, and database URLs by default
- Live search, filtering, sorting, pagination, and validation statistics
- Exports pretty or minified JSON and cleaned .env files with duplicate and comment options
- Keyboard shortcuts for opening, clearing, searching, and downloading
- Works completely offline in a single browser-only HTML file

tools.name: Alt Text Helper
tools.shortDescription: Draft image alt text and get instant feedback on whether it's clear, concise, and accessible.
tools.longDescription:
## Alt Text Helper

Preview an image locally, draft its alt text, and get instant guidance on whether the description is too vague, too long, repetitive, or missing detail — with a scaffold to help you start. Runs fully offline.

### Features

- Upload or drag-and-drop an image to preview it locally (never uploaded)
- Insert a guided fill-in scaffold to start a description
- Flags common issues: too vague, too long, repetitive, redundant "image of" openers, unfilled placeholders, and filenames
- Live character counter with screen-reader-friendly length guidance
- Tips for writing accessible, context-aware alt text
- Copy the final alt text to the clipboard
- Clear and start over with one click
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works offline

tools.name: Animation Cubic-Bezier Editor
tools.shortDescription: Visually create and customize CSS cubic-bezier() easing functions with a live animation preview.
tools.longDescription:
## Animation Cubic-Bezier Editor

A professional visual editor for crafting custom CSS easing functions.

### Features

- **Interactive Canvas:** Draggable control points to visually sculpt your bezier curve.
- **Live Preview:** Real-time animation box to instantly test how your easing feels.
- **Smart Presets:** One-click load standard easings (`ease`, `ease-in`, `ease-out`, `ease-in-out`, `linear`).
- **Instant Export:** Auto-generates standard-compliant `cubic-bezier()` CSS syntax with a 1-click copy feature.
- **Offline First:** Operates entirely client-side using Vanilla JS and native SVG manipulation.

## API Response Mocker

API Response Mocker allows developers to define custom JSON responses and simulate API endpoints directly in the browser.

### Features
- Define custom JSON responses.
- Create mock API endpoints with custom paths.
- Support different HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE).
- Select custom HTTP status codes.
- Auto-formatting and syntax validation for JSON payloads.
- Preview mock responses instantly.
- Fully offline local storage persistence.
tools.name: API Response Mocker
tools.shortDescription: Define custom JSON responses and simulate API endpoints directly in the browser.

tools.name: ARIA Role Reference
tools.shortDescription: A fast, offline reference for common WAI-ARIA roles with attributes, semantic alternatives, and examples.
tools.longDescription:
## ARIA Role Reference

Browse and search common WAI-ARIA roles as a quick offline reference. Each role shows its purpose, commonly used attributes, the preferred semantic HTML alternative, a copyable code example, and common mistakes to avoid.

### Features

- Searchable, category-grouped list of common ARIA roles
- Instant filtering by role name, category, or purpose
- Purpose and description for each role
- Commonly used ARIA attributes shown as chips
- Semantic HTML alternative highlighted where one exists
- Copyable code example demonstrating correct usage
- Common accessibility mistakes for each role
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works offline

tools.name: Aspect Ratio Calculator
tools.shortDescription: Calculate and simplify aspect ratios instantly. Supports common presets and outputs decimal ratio and CSS padding-bottom values.
tools.longDescription:
## Aspect Ratio Calculator

A quick utility for calculating and simplifying aspect ratios from any width and height.

### Features

- Real-time calculation as you type
- Simplified ratio (e.g. 16:9, 4:3)
- Decimal ratio for CSS and design tools
- CSS padding-bottom percentage for responsive containers
- Common presets (16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 21:9)
- Copy result to clipboard
- Light and dark mode support
- Works completely offline

tools.name: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
tools.shortDescription: A simple, offline utility to encode raw text into Base64 format and decode Base64 strings back to text.
tools.longDescription:
## Base64 Encoder / Decoder

A simple, offline utility to encode raw text into Base64 format and decode Base64 strings back into human-readable text.

### Features

- **Instant Conversion:** Real-time encoding and decoding as you type.
- **File Upload:** Select small files (like images) and instantly convert them to Base64 data URIs.
- **Offline First:** Operates entirely client-side using Vanilla JS.
- **Error Detection:** Automatically identifies invalid Base64 input and prevents UI crashes.

tools.name: Base64 Image Converter
tools.shortDescription: Convert images to Base64 data URIs, or decode Base64 strings back into viewable images.
tools.longDescription:
## Base64 Image Converter

Convert an image to a Base64 data URI, or decode a Base64 string / data URI back into a viewable image — entirely offline, with no upload.

### Features

- Encode: upload or drag-and-drop an image to get its Base64 data URI
- Copy the Base64 string or a ready-to-use CSS `url()` value
- Decode: paste a data URI or raw Base64 to preview and download the image
- Live preview with file size and encoded length shown
- Clear/reset either panel independently
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works offline

tools.name: Bash Sandbox
tools.shortDescription: A simulated bash terminal to play with and learn common commands, entirely in your browser.
tools.longDescription:
## Bash Sandbox

A simulated bash terminal environment that runs entirely in your browser. It's a safe and fun way to learn and experiment with common shell commands like `ls`, `cd`, `cat`, `mkdir`, and `echo` without any risk to your system. The sandbox operates on a virtual file system that resets on every page load.

### Features

- A realistic terminal-like interface.
- Support for core commands: `ls`, `cd`, `cat`, `mkdir`, `touch`, `pwd`, `echo`, `clear`, and `help`.
- A virtual file system to navigate and manipulate.
- Command history using up/down arrow keys.
- Tab autocompletion for paths.
- Works entirely offline.

tools.name: Binary Decimal Converter
tools.shortDescription: Convert between binary, decimal, hexadecimal, and octal.
tools.longDescription:
## Binary Decimal Converter

Convert between binary, decimal, hexadecimal, and octal.

### Features

- Single HTML file
- Works offline
- Dark mode support
- Responsive design

tools.name: Box Shadow Generator
tools.shortDescription: Design CSS box shadows visually with live preview, presets, and copy-ready output.
tools.longDescription:
## Box Shadow Generator

A visual CSS box-shadow designer for developers and designers.

### Features

- Interactive sliders for offset X/Y, blur radius, spread, and opacity
- Color picker for shadow color
- Inset shadow toggle
- Multiple shadow layers support
- Preset shadow styles
- Live preview with customizable element
- One-click copy of generated CSS code
- Responsive, mobile-friendly design
- Works completely offline

tools.name: Canonical URL Checker
tools.shortDescription: Analyze HTML to verify canonical URL implementation and identify common SEO issues.
tools.longDescription:
## Canonical URL Checker

Analyze pasted HTML to detect missing, duplicate, invalid, relative, or incorrectly placed canonical tags.

### Features
- Detects missing canonical tags
- Identifies duplicate canonical tags
- Validates absolute canonical URLs
- Detects relative or empty canonical URLs
- Checks if the canonical tag is placed inside the <head> section
- Provides SEO recommendations
- Copy analysis report
- Download report as a text file
- Works completely offline

tools.name: Case Converter
tools.shortDescription: Transform text between UPPERCASE, lowercase, camelCase, snake_case, and more.
tools.longDescription:
## Case Converter

A tool that transforms input text between different case and casing conventions. Useful for developers who need to quickly reformat variable names, headings, or copy between styles (e.g. converting a sentence into camelCase for a JS variable, or into CONSTANT_CASE for an env var), as well as writers who want quick title-casing or sentence-casing for headings and copy.

### Features
- Convert text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, and Sentence case
- Convert to programming case styles: camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE
- Fun/novelty conversions: aLtErNaTiNg CaSe and iNVERSE CaSe
- Live character and word count for the input
- One-click "Copy result" button with confirmation feedback
- Smart word-splitting that correctly re-splits existing camelCase/snake_case/kebab-case input before converting to a new format
- Fully keyboard accessible, dark mode support

tools.name: Chrono / Timezone Converter
tools.shortDescription: Visually synchronize and convert time across multiple global timezones.
tools.longDescription:
## Chrono / Timezone Converter

A visual timezone converter and timeline slider designed to help developers and remote teams coordinate meetings and server deployment windows across the globe.

### Features
- Select and add multiple timezones to your dashboard
- Interactive timeline scrubber to see synced local times
- Highlight working hours (9 AM - 5 PM) to easily spot overlapping availability
- Reset to current 'Now' time with a single click
- 100% offline using native Intl API

tools.name: Clip Path Generator
tools.shortDescription: Visually create complex CSS clip-path shapes and instantly copy the generated code.
tools.longDescription:
## Clip Path Generator

A visual CSS `clip-path` generator for developers and designers.

### Features

- Interactive visual editor with draggable control points
- Preset shapes (Triangle, Chevron, Star, Hexagon, Circle, etc.) for a quick start
- Real-time preview of the CSS clip-path effect
- One-click "Copy CSS" functionality for the generated code
- Responsive, mobile-friendly design
- Works completely offline

tools.name: Code Snippet Manager
tools.shortDescription: Store, categorize, and retrieve code snippets with syntax highlighting, entirely offline.
tools.longDescription:
## Code Snippet Manager

A personal, offline code snippet manager that allows developers to store, categorize, and quickly retrieve frequently used code blocks. It features syntax highlighting for various programming languages, a search function, and one-click copy-to-clipboard functionality. All snippets are stored locally in the browser's `localStorage`.

### Features

- Add, edit, and delete code snippets.
- Assign a language (e.g., JavaScript, Python, CSS) to each snippet.
- Syntax highlighting via a lightweight CDN library (Highlight.js).
- Search and filter snippets by name, language, or tags.
- One-click copy to clipboard.
- Persist snippets in `localStorage`.
- Import/Export snippets as a JSON file.

tools.name: Color Mixer Tool
tools.shortDescription: Mix colors and generate harmonious color palettes.
tools.longDescription:
## Color Mixer Tool

Mix colors and generate harmonious color palettes.

### Features

- Single HTML file
- Works offline
- Dark mode support
- Responsive design

tools.name: Color Palette Extractor
tools.shortDescription: Extract dominant colors and generate beautiful palettes directly from images in your browser.
tools.longDescription:
## Color Palette Extractor

A client-side image utility that allows users to upload an image and automatically extracts its most dominant colors, generating a beautiful, harmonious color palette.

### Features

- Drag-and-drop or click to upload an image file (JPG, PNG, WebP)
- Automatically extracts the top 5-7 dominant colors using client-side canvas processing and color quantization algorithms
- Displays a visual palette of the extracted colors with one-click "Copy HEX" and "Copy RGB" buttons
- Interactive preview of the uploaded image
- Works completely offline and entirely in the browser with no backend servers
- Responsive, beautiful dark-mode UI with subtle glassmorphism effects

tools.name: Color Palette Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate beautiful random color combinations for designers and frontend developers.
tools.longDescription:
## Color Palette Generator

A modern tool that creates beautiful color combinations for designers and frontend developers. Press spacebar to rapidly generate new palettes.

### Features

- Generate 5-color palettes instantly
- Lock individual colors (🔒/🔓) while regenerating the rest
- Click to instantly copy HEX codes to your clipboard
- Export as CSS root variables
- Export as a JSON array file
- Fully responsive layout for mobile testing

tools.name: Color Picker
tools.shortDescription: Pick a color and view it in HEX, RGB, HSL, and HSV, with generated shades and recent colors.
tools.longDescription:
## Color Picker

Pick a color visually and instantly see its value across HEX, RGB, HSL, and HSV. Edit any format to synchronize the rest, generate a shade strip, and build a running palette of recently used colors.

### Features

- Interactive color picker using the native browser color input
- Live values in HEX, RGB, HSL, and HSV
- Edit any supported format to synchronize the others
- Live contrast preview against white and black
- One-click copy for each format
- Recently selected colors palette
- Generated lighter/darker shade strip
- Clear/reset to the default color
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works entirely offline

tools.name: Command Step Loader
tools.shortDescription: Load multiple commands and copy them one at a time with a terminal-style interface.
tools.longDescription:
## Command Step Loader

A terminal-inspired productivity tool for developers who frequently execute multiple commands sequentially.

### Features

- Paste multiple commands at once
- Load commands line-by-line
- Previous and Next navigation
- One-click copy for the current command
- Progress indicator showing current position
- Terminal-style interface with CRT effects
- Works completely offline

tools.name: Commit Message Generator
tools.shortDescription: Build Conventional Commits-formatted commit messages with live preview and validation.
tools.longDescription:
## Commit Message Generator

Build a properly formatted commit message following the Conventional Commits specification. Choose a type, optional scope, description, body, and footer — including breaking-change notes — with a live preview as you type.

### Features

- Full set of Conventional Commits types (feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, build, ci, chore, revert)
- Plain-English explanation and a clickable example for each type
- Optional scope, body, and footer sections
- BREAKING CHANGE footer generation with the `!` header marker
- Live preview that updates as fields change
- Character counter for the subject line (recommended ≤50 characters)
- Validation against common Conventional Commits mistakes
- One-click copy to the clipboard
- Clear/reset the form with a single click
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works entirely offline

tools.name: Contrast Checker
tools.shortDescription: Check the WCAG 2.1 contrast ratio between two colors with AA/AAA compliance and a live text preview.
tools.longDescription:
## Contrast Checker

Evaluate the contrast ratio between a foreground and background color against WCAG 2.1 guidelines. Pick or enter colors in HEX, RGB, or HSL and instantly see the ratio, compliance status, and a live text preview.

### Features

- Foreground and background color pickers or HEX/RGB/HSL text entry
- Real-time WCAG 2.1 contrast ratio
- Compliance status for AA and AAA, normal and large text
- Live preview of normal and large text using the selected colors
- One-click swap of foreground and background
- Double-click to copy any color value
- Reset to default colors
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works entirely offline

tools.name: Cron Expression Builder
tools.shortDescription: Build and customize cron schedules with presets, validation, explanations, and upcoming run previews.
tools.longDescription:
## Cron Expression Builder

Design cron schedules with an elegant interface, common presets, instant validation, human-readable explanations, and next-run previews.

tools.name: CSS Color Converter
tools.shortDescription: Convert between Hex, RGB, HSL, HSLA, and OKLCH color formats instantly with a visual picker.
tools.longDescription:
## CSS Color Converter

A comprehensive color format converter with an integrated visual color picker for developers and designers.

### Features

- Convert between Hex, RGB, HSL, HSLA, and OKLCH color formats
- Interactive color picker with saturation/lightness spectrum canvas
- HSL sliders for fine-tuned color adjustment
- Preset color palette for quick selection
- Nearest CSS named color detection
- One-click copy for all output formats
- Real-time preview swatch with hex display
- Light and dark mode support
- Responsive, mobile-friendly design
- Works completely offline

tools.name: CSS Easing Visualizer
tools.shortDescription: Compare multiple CSS easing curves side-by-side on a shared graph and in an animated race preview.
tools.longDescription:
## CSS Easing Visualizer

Compare multiple CSS easing curves side-by-side — see their shape on a shared graph and watch them race in an animated preview, so you can pick the right motion feel by comparison rather than editing one curve in isolation.

### Features

- Add and remove multiple curves (named presets or custom cubic-bezier values)
- Shared, color-coded SVG graph plotting each curve's progress over time
- Animated race track with one ball per curve, driven by the Web Animations API
- Adjustable shared duration for a fair comparison
- Legend showing each curve's resolved CSS easing value
- Runs completely offline

tools.name: CSS Grid Generator
tools.shortDescription: Build CSS Grid layouts visually with configurable columns, rows, gap, and sizing options.
tools.longDescription:
## CSS Grid Generator

A visual CSS Grid layout builder for developers and designers.

### Features

- Configurable columns (1–12) and rows (1–8) via sliders
- Adjustable gap size with live preview
- Column sizing modes: Equal (1fr), Auto, Responsive (minmax), Max-content
- Row sizing modes: Equal (1fr), Auto, Min-content, Max-content
- Live grid preview with numbered cells
- One-click copy of generated CSS code
- Responsive, mobile-friendly design
- Works completely offline

tools.name: CSS Specificity Calculator
tools.shortDescription: Break down CSS selectors into their specificity score and see which rule wins a conflict.
tools.longDescription:
## CSS Specificity Calculator

Paste CSS selectors or a full stylesheet and see each selector's specificity broken down into ID, class, and element counts, ranked by which rule would win.

### Features

- Parses individual selectors or a full pasted stylesheet
- Breaks down specificity into ID, class/attribute/pseudo-class, and element/pseudo-element counts
- Correctly handles :is(), :not(), :has(), and :where() per the CSS specification
- Ranks selectors to show which one wins a conflict
- Flags !important usage separately
- Syntax-highlighted selector display
- Copy results as plain text
- Light and dark mode support
- Works completely offline

tools.name: CSS Unit Converter
tools.shortDescription: Instantly convert between px, rem, em, vw, vh, and percentages.
tools.longDescription:
## CSS Unit Converter

A professional utility for frontend developers to instantly convert between absolute and relative CSS units.

### Features

- **Comprehensive Conversions:** Supports `px`, `rem`, `em`, `vw`, `vh`, `%`, and `pt`.
- **Dynamic Base Context:** Set custom base font sizes and viewport dimensions for highly accurate relative calculations.
- **Real-Time Engine:** Values update instantly across all unit fields as you type.
- **One-Click Copy:** Copy individual values instantly to your clipboard.
- **Offline First:** Zero dependencies, running entirely within the browser memory.

tools.name: CSS Variable Explorer
tools.shortDescription: Extract, edit, preview, copy, and download CSS custom properties with a live theme preview.
tools.longDescription:
## CSS Variable Explorer

A standalone tool to extract CSS custom properties (variables), edit them visually, preview theme changes in real time, and export the updated CSS.

### Features

- Extract CSS variables from pasted CSS
- Search variables instantly
- Edit variable values
- Color picker for color variables
- Live theme preview
- Copy generated CSS
- Download updated CSS file
- Fully offline and self-contained

tools.name: CSS Variable Explorer & Theme Generator
tools.shortDescription: Explore, edit, and export CSS custom properties with live preview and a glassmorphism UI.
tools.longDescription:
## CSS Variable Explorer & Theme Generator

A glassmorphism-styled tool for exploring and editing CSS custom properties.

### Features

- Browse and edit CSS variables in real time
- Live preview of changes
- Export generated theme
- Glassmorphism UI design

tools.name: Curl Builder
tools.shortDescription: Construct ready-to-run cURL commands for REST APIs with headers, auth, body types, query params, and file uploads.
tools.longDescription:
## Curl Builder

Build and copy shell-ready cURL commands with support for query parameters, headers, auth modes, JSON/form/raw bodies, and multipart file upload.

### Features

- Select HTTP method and request URL
- Add query parameters and custom headers
- Basic auth and bearer token support
- JSON / form / raw body payload support
- Multipart file upload field support
- Copy command to clipboard instantly
- Offline-first single HTML file with no dependencies

tools.name: Favicon Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate a complete favicon pack and integration tags from any image, offline.
tools.longDescription:
## Favicon Generator

A client-side tool that turns any image into a full favicon pack — no server, no upload.

### Features

- Generates 7 sizes (16, 32, 48, 64, 180, 192, 512px)
- Center-crop auto-resize via Canvas
- Live preview grid with individual downloads
- Ready-to-paste HTML `<link>` tags
- One-click ZIP export of the full pack
- Works completely offline

tools.name: Flexbox Playground
tools.shortDescription: Experiment with Flexbox properties visually and copy the generated CSS.
tools.longDescription:
## Flexbox Playground

A visual tool for experimenting with CSS Flexbox layouts in real time.

### Features

- Configure flex-direction, justify-content, align-items, align-content, flex-wrap, and gap
- Live preview with configurable item count
- Copy generated CSS to clipboard
- Responsive layout — works on desktop and mobile
- Dark mode via prefers-color-scheme

tools.name: Git Command Explainer
tools.shortDescription: Explain any Git command in plain English, with full flag-by-flag breakdowns for the most commonly used commands.
tools.longDescription:
## Git Command Explainer

Type or paste a Git command and get a clear, accurate explanation. Every Git porcelain command gets a command-level explanation, and the most commonly used commands get a full flag-by-flag breakdown.

### Features

- Command-level explanations covering the full range of Git porcelain commands
- Deep flag-by-flag breakdown for 26 high-usage commands (add, commit, push, pull, fetch, merge, rebase, reset, checkout, switch, restore, branch, stash, log, diff, cherry-pick, revert, tag, clone, remote, clean, blame, init, show, worktree, config)
- Correctly parses combined short flags (e.g. -am splits into -a and -m) and flag arguments
- Flags destructive or irreversible operations with a clear warning (e.g. reset --hard, push --force, clean -fd)
- Honest fallback for unrecognized commands or flags instead of guessing
- Clickable example commands to try instantly
- Light and dark mode support
- Works completely offline

tools.name: Git Ignore Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate boilerplate .gitignore files for various technologies instantly, offline.
tools.longDescription:
## Git Ignore Generator

A simple, offline tool to generate .gitignore files.

### Features

- Select from popular templates (Node, Python, Java, C++, Go, Ruby, PHP, React, Vue, Angular, Rust, macOS, Windows, Linux, VSCode, IntelliJ, Vim, Android, iOS)
- Real-time preview
- Searchable tag interface
- Copy to clipboard
- Download .gitignore file
- Works completely offline

tools.name: GitHub Profile README Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate a professional GitHub profile README with live stats and an editable preview.
tools.longDescription:
## GitHub Profile README Generator

This tool helps developers create a professional and visually appealing README for their GitHub profile. It provides a simple form to input personal details and automatically generates the corresponding Markdown, complete with social links, skill badges, and live-fetched GitHub statistics.

### Features

- Live Markdown editor with a rendered preview tab.
- Fetches and displays GitHub stats (total stars, forks, contributions) automatically.
- Generates sections for a bio, tech stack (with badges), and social media links (with icons).
- Allows for direct editing of the generated Markdown.
- Provides "Copy Markdown" and "Download README.md" functionality.
- Runs entirely in the browser, ensuring user privacy.

tools.name: GitHub Token Validator (Glassmorphism)
tools.shortDescription: Glassmorphism-themed GitHub Token Validator tool that allows users to validate GitHub Personal Access Tokens directly in the browser.
tools.longDescription:
## GitHub Token Validator (Glassmorphism)

A Glassmorphism-themed GitHub token validator that checks Personal Access Tokens against the GitHub API.

### Features

- Glassmorphism-style UI with command-line aesthetics
- Validates GitHub Personal Access Tokens (classic, fine-grained, or OAuth)
- Displays user identity, scopes, and token metadata
- Real-time validation with clear status indicators
- Works in the browser — no server required

tools.name: GitHub Token Validator (Modern)
tools.shortDescription: Validate GitHub Personal Access Tokens with a sleek, modern interface. Token never leaves your browser.
tools.longDescription:
## GitHub Token Validator (Modern)

A modern-themed GitHub token validator with clean UI.

### Features

- Validate GitHub Personal Access Tokens
- Display user identity and scopes
- Token never leaves the browser
- Modern, clean design

tools.name: GitHub Token Validator (Terminal)
tools.shortDescription: Validate GitHub Personal Access Tokens with a terminal-style UI that displays user identity and scopes.
tools.longDescription:
## GitHub Token Validator (Terminal)

A terminal-themed GitHub token validator that checks Personal Access Tokens against the GitHub API.

### Features

- Terminal-style UI with command-line aesthetics
- Validates GitHub Personal Access Tokens (classic, fine-grained, or OAuth)
- Displays user identity, scopes, and token metadata
- Real-time validation with clear status indicators
- Works in the browser — no server required

tools.name: GitHub Token Validator GitHub Style
tools.shortDescription: Validate GitHub Personal Access Tokens with a clean, modern, and responsive card-based interface GitHub style.
tools.longDescription:
## GitHub Token Validator GitHub Style

Validate GitHub Personal Access Tokens and inspect owner, scopes, and status with a beautiful, responsive, modern card UI.

### Features

- Modern card-based responsive layout with dark mode support.
- Validates GitHub Personal Access Tokens (classic, fine-grained, or OAuth tokens) securely in the browser.
- Displays Token Metadata including user avatar, username, and active scopes.
- Show/Hide Token Toggle for privacy and easier screen sharing.
- Real-Time Validation Results with clean status indicators and loading spinners.
- Built with Tailwind CSS and Vanilla JS with no external build steps.

tools.name: GitHub Token Validator Plain
tools.shortDescription: Validate GitHub Personal Access Tokens with a clean, straightforward interface.
tools.longDescription:
## GitHub Token Validator

Validate GitHub Personal Access Tokens and inspect owner, scopes, and status with a simple, distraction-free interface.

### Features

- Clean and Minimal UI focused on token validation and inspection
- Validates GitHub Personal Access Tokens (classic, fine-grained, or OAuth tokens) securely in the browser
- Displays Token Metadata including username, active scopes/permissions, and response headers
- Show/Hide Token Toggle for privacy and easier screen sharing
- Real-Time Validation Results with clear status indicators and error messages
- Lightweight, Offline-First implementation built with native web technologies and no external dependencies

tools.name: GitHub Token Validator Retro
tools.shortDescription: Validate GitHub Personal Access Tokens with a retro terminal themed interface.
tools.longDescription:
## GitHub Token Validator Retro

Validate GitHub Personal Access Tokens and inspect owner, scopes, and status in a classic command-line CRT style.

### Features

- Green CRT Terminal Interface with scanline overlays, flickering, and glowing text
- Validates GitHub Personal Access Tokens (classic, fine-grained, or OAuth tokens) securely in the browser
- Displays Token Metadata including username, active scopes/permissions, and headers
- ASCII Art Terminal Banner and blinking terminal command prompts
- Show/Hide Token Toggle for privacy when sharing screens
- Offline-First Styling utilizing native monospace font fallbacks with VT323 font integration

tools.name: Glassmorphism Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate sleek, frosted-glass UI effects for your components.
tools.longDescription:
## Glassmorphism Generator

A visual CSS generator that allows developers and designers to instantly create frosted glass effects (glassmorphism) for UI components.

### Features

- Interactive sliders for blur radius, transparency (opacity), and saturation
- Live preview area showing the glass effect overlaid on a vibrant background image or gradient
- Color picker to adjust the glass tint (light vs dark glass)
- Controls for border and shadow to enhance the 3D effect
- One-click "Copy CSS" functionality for the generated code
- Responsive and modern UI design
- Works completely offline

tools.name: Gradient Builder
tools.shortDescription: Visually build linear or radial CSS gradients with multiple color stops and copy-ready CSS.
tools.longDescription:
## Gradient Builder

- One-click copy or download of the generated CSS
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works entirely offline

tools.name: Hash Generator

### Features

- URL input with GET / HEAD method selector

- Full response headers table, alphabetically sorted
- Clear note explaining CORS-limited header visibility for cross-origin requests

## Image Metadata Viewer

An offline web utility designed to extract and display hidden metadata (EXIF, IPTC, XMP) embedded inside image files. It helps developers, photographers, and privacy-conscious users inspect camera settings, geolocation data, creation dates, and copyright information locally without uploading private photos to an external server.

### Features

- **Drag-and-Drop:** Instantly load and parse images.
- **Extensive Parsing:** Extracts detailed EXIF data (camera model, exposure, focal length, ISO, GPS coordinates).
- **Export to JSON:** Download the extracted data for programmatic use.
- **Offline First:** Operates entirely client-side using Vanilla JS.
- **Privacy Focused:** Your images never leave your device.

- Expiry detection — shows Valid, Expired, or Decoded status badge
- Copy individual parts (header JSON, payload JSON, signature) or all as combined JSON
- Auto-decode on paste — no button click needed
- Works completely offline — nothing leaves your browser

tools.name: Open Graph Inspector
tools.shortDescription: Analyze meta tags, social previews, and SEO metadata for any URL with actionable scores.
tools.longDescription:
## Open Graph Inspector

A comprehensive Open Graph and meta tag analyzer that fetches any URL and breaks down its social sharing metadata, SEO tags, and rich preview data.

### Features

- **URL or Paste HTML** - Enter a URL to fetch, or paste raw HTML directly
- **Social Previews** - See exactly how links appear on Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and other platforms
- **OG Tag Analysis** - Scores your Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:image, etc.) out of 7
- **Twitter Card Analysis** - Validates Twitter Card meta tags (5-point check)
- **SEO Metadata Check** - Evaluates standard SEO tags like title, description, canonical, and robots
- **Actionable Scores** - Color-coded pass/fail indicators with specific recommendations
- **Favicon Detection** - Finds and displays all linked icons
- **Keyboard Shortcuts** - Full keyboard navigation support for power users
- **Export Results** - Download analysis as JSON
- **Dark Mode** - Automatic dark/light theme with manual toggle
- **CORS Proxy Fallback** - Multiple proxy strategies for fetching cross-origin URLs
- **Clipboard Paste** - Paste HTML directly from clipboard for offline analysis

tools.name: Palette Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate unique, collision-free variation color schemes based on color theory metrics, offline.
tools.longDescription:
## Palette Generator

A modern client-side color utility that creates harmonious, perceptually balanced color palettes instantly.

### Features

- **Harmony Schemes:** Supports Complementary, Analogous, Triadic, Tetradic, and Monochromatic configurations.
- **Collision-Free Engine:** Uses a perceptually weighted color distance metric to eliminate duplicate or nearly identical colors.
- **Dynamic Variations:** Instantly shifts brightness, saturation, and hue steps with a non-clamping variation seed system.
- **Real-Time Interface:** Syncs hex textual data inputs with system color pickers automatically without refreshing.
- **Export Ecosystem:** One-click JSON generation containing complete schema distributions and formatted strings tagged with active metrics.
- **Works Completely Offline:** Fully self-contained without tracking servers or external framework dependency overhead.

tools.name: Password Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate highly secure, cryptographic random passwords instantly. 100% offline, privacy guaranteed.
tools.longDescription:
## Password Generator

A secure, client-side password generator that creates strong, random passwords. It runs entirely offline in the browser, ensuring that no passwords are ever sent over a network or stored on a server.

### Features

- Interactive slider to choose password length (e.g., 4 to 64 characters)
- Toggle options for Uppercase, Lowercase, Numbers, and Symbols
- **New:** Option to exclude ambiguous characters (e.g., i, l, 1, L, o, 0, O) to improve readability
- Real-time password strength indicator based on entropy
- "One-click copy" to instantly copy the generated password to the clipboard
- 100% offline and secure—runs entirely in the browser using the native Web Crypto API (`crypto.getRandomValues`) for cryptographic randomness

tools.name: Privacy Policy Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate customizable privacy policies for websites and apps with live preview, copy, and download.
tools.longDescription:
## Privacy Policy Generator

- GDPR and CCPA compliance options
- Live preview of generated policy

- Works completely offline

A client-side QR Code Generator that allows users to instantly convert text, URLs, or data into high-quality QR codes. It runs completely offline in the browser.

- Input fields for standard Text or URLs
- Options to customize the QR code (e.g., Foreground color, Background color, and Error Correction Level)

tools.name: Responsive Breakpoint Tester
tools.shortDescription: Test responsive layouts instantly via URL or raw HTML sandbox with intelligent scaling.
tools.longDescription:
## Responsive Breakpoint Tester

A professional utility for web developers to preview websites at common device widths and custom breakpoints.

### Features

- **Dual Testing Modes:** Test live URLs or use the Local Sandbox to paste raw HTML/CSS (bypassing `X-Frame-Options` restrictions).
- **Intelligent Scaling:** Automatically scales down the viewport to fit your screen if the target device resolution exceeds your physical monitor size.
- **Smart Presets:** Instantly switch between Mobile, Tablet, Laptop, and Desktop resolutions.
- **Custom Controls:** Define exact custom dimensions and instantly rotate device orientation.
- **Offline Sandbox:** The HTML paste functionality operates 100% offline within your browser.

tools.name: Responsive Image Simulator
tools.shortDescription: Preview a srcset/sizes image at common device breakpoints and see which source the browser selects.
tools.longDescription: ## Responsive Image Simulator Preview a responsive image (`srcset`/`sizes`) at common device breakpoints and see exactly which source the browser selects and at what rendered width. Useful for debugging responsive image markup without manually resizing a real browser window. ### Features - Editable srcset, sizes, and fallback src fields with validation - Breakpoint tabs for common device widths (mobile, tablet, laptop, desktop, wide) - Renders the real `` element at the chosen viewport width and reads its actual `currentSrc` - Info cards showing viewport width, selected source, natural image size, and active sizes value - Explanatory note on how the simulation reflects real browser image-selection behavior - Runs entirely client-side

tools.name: Robots.txt Generator
tools.shortDescription: Visually build, manage, and export standard-compliant robots.txt files with live syntax highlighting.
tools.longDescription:
## Robots.txt Generator

A professional, offline-capable SEO utility designed to help webmasters and developers create valid `robots.txt` files through an intuitive visual interface.

### Features

- **Visual Rule Builder:** Easily add multiple User-Agent groups and configure specific Allow/Disallow directives without writing syntax manually.
- **Global Directives:** Manage global configurations like XML Sitemaps, Crawl-delay, and Host declarations.
- **Live Syntax Highlighting:** View your generated `robots.txt` in real-time with an integrated, lightweight syntax highlighter.
- **1-Click Presets:** Instantly load common SEO configurations (e.g., Allow All, Disallow All, Standard SEO, WordPress Base).
- **Zero Dependencies:** Operates entirely client-side using the native DOM and Blob API for secure, immediate file generation.
- **Premium Developer UI:** Designed with a modern, split-screen console layout featuring comprehensive dark/light mode support.

A standalone Sitemap Generator that helps users create valid XML sitemaps for websites.

### Features

- Add multiple website URLs individually.
- **New:** Bulk Import a list of URLs instantly via copy-paste.
- Set last modified (lastmod) date.

- Generate valid XML sitemap with real-time XML preview.

tools.name: Slug Generator

tools.longDescription:
## Slug Generator

Convert titles, headings, or phrases into clean, SEO-friendly URL slugs in real time. Normalizes accented and Unicode characters, strips punctuation, and lets you customize casing, separators, and number handling.

### Features

- Generates slugs in real time as you type
- Optional lowercase conversion
- Customizable separator (hyphen or underscore)
- Removes punctuation, special characters, and extra whitespace
- Normalizes accented/Unicode characters (e.g. Café → cafe)
- Option to keep or remove numbers
- Live preview of the generated slug
- One-click copy to the clipboard
- Clear/reset with a single click
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works entirely offline

tools.name: SQL to MongoDB Translator
tools.shortDescription: Translate standard SQL queries instantly into MongoDB Aggregation Pipeline JSON arrays.
tools.longDescription:
## SQL to MongoDB Translator

Developers migrating from relational databases to MongoDB often struggle to write complex NoSQL queries. This tool allows users to write standard SQL queries (including SELECT, WHERE, GROUP BY, ORDER BY, and LIMIT) and instantly translates them into the equivalent MongoDB Aggregation Pipeline JSON array.

### Features

- Write SQL in a clean editor with basic auto-formatting
- Translates `SELECT/FROM` into `$project` stages
- Translates `WHERE` conditions into `$match` stages
- Translates `GROUP BY` into `$group` with basic aggregations (COUNT, SUM, AVG)
- Translates `ORDER BY` into `$sort`
- Translates `LIMIT` into `$limit`
- Client-side parser ensuring privacy (no backend required)
- Instantly copy the resulting JSON pipeline

tools.name: SVG Optimizer
tools.shortDescription: Compress and optimize raw SVG code by removing unnecessary metadata, empty tags, and comments.
tools.longDescription:
## SVG Optimizer

A single-file tool to compress and optimize raw SVG code by removing unnecessary metadata, empty tags, and comments.

### Features

- Paste raw SVG code for instant optimization
- Removes `<title>`, `<desc>`, `<!-- comments -->`, and empty tags
- Live visual preview container to ensure SVG integrity
- Instantly copy or download optimized minified SVG
- Works completely offline locally in your browser

tools.name: SVG Previewer
tools.shortDescription: Paste raw SVG markup and preview it instantly, with validation and quick export options.
tools.longDescription:
## SVG Previewer

Paste raw SVG markup and see it rendered instantly. Validates the markup, shows a checkerboard background to reveal transparency, and offers quick export to `.svg`, `.png`, a data URI, or the clipboard.

### Features

- Instant live preview as you type
- Validation with clear error messages for malformed markup
- Checkerboard, white, black, and dark background options

- Shows viewBox, width/height, element count, and file size

- Download as `.svg` or rasterized `.png`
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works entirely offline

Paste a string of Tailwind utility classes and get the equivalent hand-written CSS rule. Useful for learning what a Tailwind class compiles to, or migrating a small component away from Tailwind without pulling in the framework.

### Features

- Editable CSS selector plus a Tailwind class input
- Covers spacing, flex/grid layout, sizing, typography, a color palette subset, borders, radius, and shadow utilities
- Handles responsive/state prefixes (`md:`, `hover:`) by converting the base utility with a note
- Lists any unrecognized classes instead of failing silently
- One-click copy of the generated CSS
- Runs completely offline

- Finds the closest Tailwind color and shade (e.g. blue-500, emerald-600)

- One-click copy of any class name or hex value
- Searchable browser for the complete Tailwind default palette

Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates, or dates back to Unix time, in either direction. Useful for developers, testers, and analysts working with logs, APIs, and scheduling systems.

### Features

- Convert Unix timestamps (seconds or milliseconds) to readable dates

- Results shown in local time, UTC, ISO 8601, and relative ("3 hours ago") form
- Live conversion as you type
- One-click "Use current time" button
- Per-value copy to clipboard

- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works entirely offline

## Twitter / X Card Preview

Preview how your content may appear when shared on Twitter/X. Enter a title, description, image URL, website URL, and choose between Summary or Summary Large Image card layouts to see a live preview.

### Features

- Live Twitter/X card preview
- Supports Summary and Summary Large Image card types
- Real-time preview updates

tools.name: Unicode Inspector
tools.shortDescription: Inspect every character's Unicode code point, UTF-8/UTF-16 bytes, category, and escape sequences.
tools.longDescription:
## Unicode Inspector

Inspect Unicode characters in real time as you type or paste text. See each character's code point, best-effort name or category, UTF-8/UTF-16 byte representation, HTML entity, and JavaScript escape sequence — with invisible and whitespace characters flagged.

### Features

- Real-time character-by-character inspection
- Unicode code point (e.g. U+1F600)
- Character name where available, else Unicode category via native \p{} property detection
- UTF-8 and UTF-16 byte/code-unit representations
- HTML entity and JavaScript Unicode escape sequences
- Highlights invisible/whitespace characters (tabs, newlines, NBSP, zero-width spaces, BOM, etc.)
- Total character and UTF-16 code unit counts
- One-click copy of any code point
- Clear/reset with a single click
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works entirely offline

tools.name: URL Encoder / Decoder
tools.shortDescription: Encode and decode URLs or percent-encoded strings instantly using native browser APIs.
tools.longDescription:
## URL Encoder / Decoder

A fast, offline utility for encoding and decoding URLs, query parameters, and percent-encoded strings using native JavaScript APIs.

### Features
- Encode complete URLs using encodeURI()
- Encode query parameters using encodeURIComponent()
- Decode percent-encoded strings using decodeURIComponent()
- Real-time conversion as you type
- Detects invalid or malformed percent-encoded strings
- Character counters for input and output
- Copy output to clipboard
- Swap input and output
- Load built-in examples
- Fully responsive design with dark mode support
- Works completely offline with no external dependencies

tools.name: User Agent Parser
tools.shortDescription: Parse any User-Agent string into a readable breakdown of browser, engine, OS, device, and CPU architecture.
tools.longDescription:
## User Agent Parser

Parse any User-Agent string — or your current browser — into a plain, readable breakdown. Identifies the browser and version, rendering engine, operating system and version, device type, and CPU architecture when available. All parsing happens entirely offline.

### Features

- Paste and parse any User-Agent string instantly
- Detects browser name and version
- Detects operating system and version (when available)
- Detects rendering engine (Blink, Gecko, WebKit, Trident, etc.)
- Detects device type (Desktop, Mobile, Tablet, Bot, Smart TV)
- Displays CPU architecture when advertised
- One-click "Use current browser" button to parse `navigator.userAgent`
- Copy parsed info as formatted text or JSON
- Clear/reset with a single click
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works completely offline

tools.name: UUID Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate random v4 UUIDs instantly, offline.
tools.longDescription:
## UUID Generator

A simple, offline tool to generate v4 UUIDs.

### Features

- Instant generation
- Multiple quantities (1, 5, 10, 50)
- Copy to clipboard
- Works completely offline

tools.name: Word / Character Counter
tools.shortDescription: Real-time word, character, and sentence counter for text of any length.
tools.longDescription:
## Word / Character Counter

A minimalist, real-time text analysis tool. Type or paste text to instantly see word, character, and sentence counts — built for writers, marketers, and developers who need quick length checks without ad-heavy websites.

### Features

- Real-time character count (including spaces)
- Real-time word count
- Real-time sentence count
- Character count excluding spaces, line count, and estimated reading time
- Copy text or clear/reset with one click
- Clean, responsive, minimalist interface
- Fully functional offline with zero dependencies

tools.name: YAML / JSON Converter
tools.shortDescription: Convert between YAML and JSON in either direction, with validation and pretty-printed output.
tools.longDescription:
## YAML / JSON Converter

Convert data between YAML and JSON in both directions. Paste YAML or JSON, instantly see it converted to the other format, and get clear validation errors if the input doesn't parse.

### Features

- Convert YAML to JSON and JSON to YAML
- Live input/output preview with instant updates
- Syntax validation with clear error messages
- Pretty-printed output with configurable indentation (2/4 spaces or tab)
- Copy converted output to the clipboard, or use it as the next input
- Clear/reset with a single click
- Supports nested objects, arrays, strings, numbers, booleans, and null
- Fully responsive, keyboard accessible, and works offline once loaded

tools.name: Target Grade Forecaster
tools.shortDescription: Calculate your current average and find out exactly what you need on the final.
tools.longDescription:
## Target Grade & GPA Forecaster

Calculate your current average and find out exactly what you need on the final exam to achieve your target grade.
